name: conflict record includes both the offending pattern id and the existing rule id it would conflict with
command: mkdir -p pr-corpus && printf '{"pattern_id":"p1","matched_rule_id":"r-existing","classification":"conflict"}\n' > decision.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/pr-corpus/surface-conflict.sh" --decision decision.json --log pr-corpus/decisions.jsonl 2>err.txt && grep -q '"pattern_id":"p1"' pr-corpus/decisions.jsonl && grep -q '"existing_rule_id":"r-existing"' pr-corpus/decisions.jsonl && echo ok 1>&2
